modules/cache/cache_disk_common.h

15 */
16
17/**
18 * @file cache_disk_common.h
19 * @brief Common Disk Cache vars/structs
20 *
21 * @defgroup Cache_cache  Cache Functions
22 * @ingroup  MOD_DISK_CACHE
23 * @{
24 */ view japanese
25
26#ifndef CACHE_DIST_COMMON_H
27#define CACHE_DIST_COMMON_H
28
29#define VARY_FORMAT_VERSION 5
30#define DISK_FORMAT_VERSION 6
31
32#define CACHE_HEADER_SUFFIX ".header"
33#define CACHE_DATA_SUFFIX   ".data"
34#define CACHE_VDIR_SUFFIX   ".vary"
35
36#define AP_TEMPFILE_PREFIX "/"
37#define AP_TEMPFILE_BASE   "aptmp"
38#define AP_TEMPFILE_SUFFIX "XXXXXX"
39#define AP_TEMPFILE_BASELEN strlen(AP_TEMPFILE_BASE)
40#define AP_TEMPFILE_NAMELEN strlen(AP_TEMPFILE_BASE AP_TEMPFILE_SUFFIX)
41#define AP_TEMPFILE AP_TEMPFILE_PREFIX AP_TEMPFILE_BASE AP_TEMPFILE_SUFFIX
42
43typedef struct {
44    /* Indicates the format of the header struct stored on-disk. */ view japanese
45    apr_uint32_t format;
46    /* The HTTP status code returned for this response.  */ view japanese
47    int status;
48    /* The size of the entity name that follows. */ view japanese
49    apr_size_t name_len;
50    /* The number of times we've cached this entity. */ view japanese
51    apr_size_t entity_version;
52    /* Miscellaneous time values. */ view japanese
53    apr_time_t date;
54    apr_time_t expire;
55    apr_time_t request_time;
56    apr_time_t response_time;
57    /* The ident of the body file, so we can test the body matches the header */ view japanese
58    apr_ino_t inode;
59    apr_dev_t device;
60    /* Does this cached request have a body? */ view japanese
61    unsigned int has_body:1;
62    unsigned int header_only:1;
63    /* The parsed cache control header */ view japanese
64    cache_control_t control;
65} disk_cache_info_t;
66
67#endif /* CACHE_DIST_COMMON_H */ view japanese
68/** @} */ view japanese

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_disk_common.h:17-24

/**
 * @file cache_disk_common.h
 * @brief ディスクキャッシュ共通の変数/構造体
 *
 * @defgroup Cache_cache  キャッシュ関数
 * @ingroup  MOD_DISK_CACHE
 * @{
 */

Original comment

 * @file cache_disk_common.h
 * @brief Common Disk Cache vars/structs
 *
 * @defgroup Cache_cache  Cache Functions
 * @ingroup  MOD_DISK_CACHE
 * @{
 */
